sourcePrompt: A domestic water buffalo standing placidly, about one point eight meters at the shoulder and built like a barrel. A massive bovine with a low-hung head carrying broad crescent horns that sweep back and out, a deep heavy body on stout legs, a short tufted tail, and a thick neck with loose folds. Dark slate-gray hide with a dusty sheen, immense and calm. Low-poly, game-ready, clean hard edges.
